ddls:
CREATE TABLE "inmates" (
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inmate */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the inmate (0 for male, 1 for female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the inmate */,
  "race" INTEGER /* Race of the inmate */,
  "ethnicity" INTEGER /* Ethnicity of the inmate */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status at the time of intake */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status at the time of intake */,
  "offense_history" TEXT /* Summary of prior offenses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inmate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inmates_age FOREIGN KEY ("age") REFERENCES age_categories ("age_cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_categories" (
  "age_cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "age_category" TEXT /* Description of the age category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the category (e.g., 18-24) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "convictions" (
  "conviction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conviction record */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inmate */,
  "juv_fel_count" INTEGER /* Number of juvenile felony convictions */,
  "juv_misd_count" INTEGER /* Number of juvenile misdemeanor convictions */,
  "juv_other_count" INTEGER /* Number of other juvenile convictions */,
  "priors_count" INTEGER /* Total number of prior convictions */,
  "most_recent_offense" TEXT /* Description of the most recent offense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conviction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_convictions_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inmate */,
  "c_charge_degree" INTEGER /* Degree of the charge (0 for misdemeanor, 1 for felony) */,
  "c_charge_desc" TEXT /* Description of the charge */,
  "plea_status" TEXT /* Current plea status (e.g., Not guilty, Guilty) */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* Scheduled trial date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recidivism_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recidivism score */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inmate */,
  "decile_score" INTEGER /* Decile score indicating the risk of recidivism */,
  "score_text" TEXT /* Text description of the risk level */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Binary indicator of recidivism (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "predicted_reoffense_date" TEXT /* Predicted date of reoffense based on the risk score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recidivism_scores_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the rehabilitation program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., counseling, vocational training) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in weeks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inmate */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the inmate enrolled in the program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the inmate completed the program */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status indicating whether the inmate completed the program (e.g., Completed, Dropped out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_enrollment_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_enrollment_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inmate */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention occurred */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Scheduled follow-up date for the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release record */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inmate */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the inmate was released */,
  "recidivism_status" TEXT /* Status indicating whether the inmate has reoffended */,
  "post_release_supervision" TEXT /* Type of post-release supervision (e.g., Parole, Probation) */,
  "parole_officer" INTEGER /* Reference to the parole officer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_parole_officer FOREIGN KEY ("parole_officer") REFERENCES parole_officers ("parole_officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corrections officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the officer within the department */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supervisor officer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officer_inmate_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corrections officer */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inmate */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was terminated (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officer_inmate_assignments_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officer_inmate_assignments_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "inmate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inmate */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Assessed level of risk */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessor (e.g., corrections officer, counselor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_inmate_id FOREIGN KEY ("inmate_id") REFERENCES inmates ("inmate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parole_officers" (
  "parole_officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parole officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the parole officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parole officer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the parole officer */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supervisor officer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parole_officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_release_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome record */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the release record */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status after release (e.g., Employed, Unemployed) */,
  "housing_status" TEXT /* Housing status after release (e.g., Stable, Unstable) */,
  "reoffense_status" TEXT /* Reoffense status after release (e.g., No, Yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_release_outcomes_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)
